name: 大萧条与新政
subject: history
domain_name: Period 6-7 镀金时代与进步时代 Gilded Age & Progressive (1865-1945)
curriculum_points:
TOPIC 6.2 Westward Expansion: Economic Development

THEMATIC FOCUS
MIG
Migration and Settlement
Push and pull factors shape immigration to and migration within America, and the demographic change as a result of these moves shapes the migrants, society, and the environment.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE HISTORICAL DEVELOPMENTS
Unit 6: Learning Objective B KC-6.2.I
Explain the causes and effects of The increase in migration to the West by
settlement of the West from white settlers, railroad companies, miners,
1877 to 1898. and ranchers.

TOPIC 6.3 Westward Expansion: Social and Cultural Development

THEMATIC FOCUS
GEO
Geography and the Environment
Geographic and environmental factors, including competition over and debates about natural resources, shape the development of America and foster regional diversity. The development of America impacts the environment and reshapes geography, which leads to debates about environmental and geographic issues.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE HISTORICAL DEVELOPMENTS
Unit 6: Learning Objective B KC-6.2.I
Explain the causes and effects of The increase in migration to the West by
settlement of the West from white settlers, railroad companies, miners,
1877 to 1898. and ranchers.

TOPIC 6.2 Westward Expansion: Economic Development

LEARNING OBJECTIVE HISTORICAL DEVELOPMENTS
Unit 6: Learning Objective B KC-6.2.I.A
Explain the causes and effects of The building of transcontinental railroads,
settlement of the West from the discovery of mineral resources, and
1877 to 1898. government policies promoted economic
growth and created new communities and
centers of commercial activity.

TOPIC 6.3 Westward Expansion: Social and Cultural Development

LEARNING OBJECTIVE HISTORICAL DEVELOPMENTS
Unit 6: Learning Objective B KC-6.2.I.B
Explain the causes and effects of In hopes of achieving ideals of self-sufficiency
settlement of the West from and independence, migrants moved to both
1877 to 1898. rural and boomtown areas of the West for
opportunities, such as building the railroads,
mining, farming, and ranching.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「大萧条与新政」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：TOPIC 6.2 Westward Expansion: Economic Development

THEMATIC FOCUS
MIG
Migration and Settlement
Push and pull factors sh…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：TOPIC 6.3 Westward Expansion: Social and Cultural Development

THEMATIC FOCUS
GE… 对理解「大萧条与新政」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
